security_gap.gap_description: Governance process (voting, timelock, Guardian review) fails to prevent whitelisting of malicious Reward Vault granting unintended privileges.

actor_risk.description: Partner system capable of submitting governance proposals.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Submission of proposal for malicious vault has low behavioral risk due to governance checks, but high potential impact if successful.

assumptions: Actor 3 submits a proposal for a malicious Reward Vault designed to grant unintended privileges.
The governance mechanism (voting quorum, timelock, Guardian multisig) is compromised, subverted, or fails to identify the malicious nature of the proposal/vault.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure robust community and Guardian review of RFRV proposals and proposed vault code.

description: A Protocol/Ecosystem Project (Actor 3) submits a Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposal to the Governance Contract (Component 9) for a malicious vault that, if approved and whitelisted by governance, would grant Actor 3 or other unauthorized parties elevated privileges or control over assets or other system components.
